model.name: BS-Roformer-Viperx-1297

notes: Best default for most guide-style runs.
Use when residual backing bleed matters more than fullness.
Higher context for stronger objective separation.

recommended_usage: Use as a phase reference source for fixing artifacts in fuller but noisier models (e.g., Unwa Inst V1e, Gabox).
